heroHeadline: Day 38: Iran Rejects Pakistan Ceasefire Plan; University Bombed, 34 Killed
heroSubtitle: Iran formally rules out a temporary truce despite Pakistan-backed mediation, as US-Israeli strikes kill 34 at top university and Houthis formally enter the war.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-06. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times.
